hexlikes.creative_tab.title: Fishcasting
item.hexlikes.unlucky_bait.desc: Prevents anything from nibbling or biting
text.hexlikes.rod_tooltip.casting_bonus: Used as a staff when held in off-hand
text.hexlikes.bobber_tooltip.focus_bonus: Can be written to as a Focus when held or cast
text.hexlikes.bobber_tooltip.blessed_bon: Rarely catches loot from any category
journal.description.hexlikes.cursed: They seem to be possessed of some intelligence, but remain unable to do much with it due to their form. Perhaps if I could free them...
hexlikes.book.fishing_patterns.title: Fishing Patterns
hexlikes.book.fishing_patterns.1: I came across a soggy book in my travels written by a sage fisher who went by the name $(italic)'Babs'/$. While most of the text consists of the ramblings of a sailor, found within the pages were some mundane patterns for fishing. While I don't see myself fishing one way or the other, I must note these down.
hexlikes.book.fishing_patterns.bobber/fr: Transforms a player on the stack into the bobber attached to their fishing pole (or $(l:casting/influences)$(thing)Null/$ if there isn't one). Costs about one $(l:items/amethyst)$(item)Amethyst Dust/$.
hexlikes.book.fishing_patterns.owner/fro: Transforms a bobber on the stack into the player which cast it. Costs about one $(l:items/amethyst)$(item)Amethyst Shard/$.
hexlikes.book.fishing_patterns.catch/fro: Transforms a bobber on the stack into the entity caught on its hook (or $(l:casting/influences)$(thing)Null/$ if there isn't one). Costs about one $(l:items/amethyst)$(item)Amethyst Shard/$.
hexlikes.book.fishing_patterns.bobber/fr: Transforms an entity on the stack into the bobber it is caught on (or $(l:casting/influences)$(thing)Null/$ if there isn't one). Costs about one $(l:items/amethyst)$(item)Charged Amethyst/$.
hexlikes.page.casting_rod.1: At least something good came from these... $(italic)Fish/$casters. While it is doubtless useful if I would like to fish, a $(thing)Casting Rod/$ is otherwise just like any $(l:items/staff)$(thing)Staff/$ when I hold it in my non-dominant hand.
hexlikes.page.focus_bobber.1: A truly remarkable invention for such a trite sport. A $(thing)Focus Bobber/$ not only extends my ambit by about an arms length from its origin, it also casts any stored hex within once I pull on it with enough force. This added range does not come for free however, as casting via the Focus Bobber costs $(l:items/amethyst)$(item)Amethyst Dust/$ equal to the square of the length of the vector from myself to the bobber.
hexlikes.page.fishy_business.1: Some useful recipes to be certain, should I ever come across a fool foolish enough to part with these without knowing their true value as sources of _Media.
hexlikes.page.fishy_business.crystal_shr: These shrimp do look quite delicious...
Especially when they're together like this...
hexlikes.page.fishy_business.crystalline: This imposing fish looks like it could channel media without any effort at all, if it had the brains to do so.
hexlikes.page.fanciful_fishing.smithing: A construction similar to the $(l:greatwork/fanciful_staves)$(thing)Fanciful Staves/$.
hexlikes.page.fanciful_fishing.1: Ha! That even that fisher should have gone to such lengths -- just in order to fish without pause... I shudder to imagine what over a week of non-stop fishing would do to my psyche. As different as this $(l:items/casting_rod)$(thing)Casting Rod/$ may look, it offers me no additional benefits in my work aside from its durability, should I wish to cast using a $(l:items/focus_bobber)$(thing)Focus Bobber/$.
hexlikes.page.fanciful_fishing.2: Among the notes in the soggy book I've found one interesting passage I could not determine the meaning of. I have transcribed it here, since the original notes are not long for this world.$(br)$(italic)'An unremarkable blob of flesh Cursed to live, intelligent much like an /$$(l:greatwork/quenching_allays)$(thing)Allay/$$(italic), yet undying. I've tried nearly everything I could to carefully desynthesize it with no luck. Should I try evaporating it with a /$$(l:patterns/great_spells/weather_manip#hexcasting:lightning)$(thing)bolt/$$(italic) of /$_Media$(italic) next? No, I must keep it for my big fish collection.'/$ - Babs
